mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DDD_CARE c JOIN DDD_USER u ON c.user_number = u.user_number WHERE c.care_status = 'open'
AND u.user_nickname LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND c.care_title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND (c.care_title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR u.user_nickname LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT rownum AS rnum, subquery.* FROM ( SELECT c.care_number, c.care_title, c.care_date, u.user_nickname, c.care_write_date, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ddd_care_apply a WHERE a.care_number = c.care_number) || '/' || c.care_recruit AS apply_status FROM ddd_care c JOIN ddd_user u ON c.user_number = u.user_number WHERE c.care_status = 'open'
AND u.user_nickname LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND c.care_title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY c.care_date ASC ) subquery ) WHERE rnum BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}

select * from ( select rownum as rnum, subquery.* from ( SELECT c.care_number, c.care_title, c.care_date, u.user_nickname, c.care_write_date FROM ddd_care c JOIN ddd_user u ON c.user_number = u.user_number WHERE c.care_status = 'open' <choose> <when test="type == 'nickname'"> AND u.user_nickname LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' </when> <when test="type == 'title'"> AND c.care_title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' </when> <otherwise> AND (c.care_title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR u.user_nickname LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%') </otherwise> </choose> ORDER BY c.care_date ASC ) subquery ) where rnum between #{startRow} and #{endRow}
SELECT c.care_number, c.care_title, c.care_date, u.user_nickname, c.care_write_date, c.care_post FROM ddd_care c JOIN ddd_user u ON c.user_number = u.user_number WHERE c.care_number = #{careNumber}

SELECT c.care_number, c.care_title, COUNT(a.apply_number) || '/' || c.care_recruit AS apply_status FROM ddd_care c LEFT JOIN ddd_care_apply a ON c.care_number = a.care_number WHERE c.care_number = #{careNumber} GROUP BY c.care_number, c.care_title, c.care_recruit
SELECT c.apply_number, u.user_number, u.user_name, u.user_nickname, u.user_phone FROM ddd_care_apply c JOIN ddd_user u ON c.user_number = u.user_number WHERE c.care_number = #{careNumber}
mapper.update: UPDATE ddd_care SET care_status = 'deleted' WHERE care_number = #{careNumber}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM (SELECT c.care_number, c.care_title, u.user_nickname, c.care_write_date FROM ddd_care c JOIN ddd_user u ON c.user_number = u.user_number ORDER BY c.care_date DESC ) WHERE rownum <= 5
